name: Shunzo Ohno
abstract: Shunzo Ohno (大野 俊三, Ōno Shunzō; born 22 March 1949) is a Japanese trumpeter, composer and arranger. In 1974 Ohno accepted Art Blakey's offer and went to the U.S.

about_quotes.speaker: Buster Williams
about_quotes.evidence: trumpet player named Shunzo Ohno. And after doing the album... I said well maybe it’s time now for me to put my own band together
about_quotes.doc_title: Buster Williams interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 6, 2002
